TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Justin Trudeau ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 12, Justin Trudeau, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1971) mrhuw Canada ta' misuw hya' ga Justin Trudeau, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Justin Trudeau minkahul sa Ottawa, Ontario na Canada. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1971 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: *us~…ētin tru*eau rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *us~…ētin tru*eau, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ¶~ ®ana*a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *us~…ētin tru*eau, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral *us~…ētin tru*eau minkańßul s~…ēa ottawa, ontario na ¶~ ®ana*a. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: Justin Trudeau ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 12, Justin Trudeau, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1971) mrhuw Canada ta' misuw hya' ga Justin Trudeau, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Justin Trudeau minkahul sa Ottawa, Ontario na Canada. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1971 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
